steps.observed: Landing page loaded with swap interface and site title CASH Orderbook

steps.expected: Tagline 'The Fastest CASH Swap Ever' is visible
steps.observed: Tagline is visible on the landing view

steps.action: Inspect landing page before wallet connection
steps.observed: Connect Wallet is visible in the header and as the swap action button
Continue with Google and Petra wallet option are visible
MetaMask and Phantom options are visible under Ethereum options

steps.expected: Amount input, asset selector, direction toggle, quote area, and execute action are visible
steps.observed: Swap panel shows amount input, CASH/USDC selectors, a center icon toggle button, 'To (estimated)' quote, and Connect Wallet action
Body/background contrast is dark (rgb(33, 33, 33) background with white foreground text)

assertions.title: Orderbook ladder display

steps.observed: Orderbook view opened with bid/ask column headers and 'No orders yet' empty-state

steps.expected: Rows show bid/ask colors, price+quantity, and cumulative depth bars with monospace prices
steps.observed: Could not verify populated bid/ask rows because depth feed had no active orders during the run

evidence.network: Repeated GET /depth and GET /trades polling captured (frontend/layout-core/VAL-FRONTEND-008-network.json)

assertions.issues: Local orderbook depth was empty (No orders yet), so row-level bid/ask coloration and cumulative-depth rendering could not be fully validated.

steps.expected: Swap view becomes active and usable
steps.observed: Swap view loaded with input fields and Connect Wallet action

steps.action: Switch from Swap back to Orderbook
steps.expected: Orderbook view becomes active and usable
steps.observed: Orderbook view loaded again with orderbook, depth chart, and order form panels

frictions.description: `agent-browser get text body` includes Next.js dev payload text alongside UI text, which adds noise during assertion checks.
frictions.resolution: Used annotated screenshots and targeted style/layout probes for deterministic evidence.

blockers.description: No live order rows were present in the orderbook during this run (empty depth state).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited for networkidle and additional settle time; confirmed continued polling to /depth and /trades with UI still showing 'No orders yet'.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions: 5 passed (VAL-FRONTEND-001/002/003/005/015), 1 blocked (VAL-FRONTEND-008) due to empty orderbook depth preventing row-level ladder validation.
